summary: Iteration 42b — Placement Stability Trajectory: ran full backend pytest (12/12 passing) plus regression on iter42/41/40b (37/37 passing). Frontend e2e verified on Maddy O'Brien's profile: card renders with trajectory block, sparkline, supportive label, modal opens, week-list with 10 buttons, week-detail updates on click, and chronology deep-link navigates with correct from_at/to_at/tab=timeline params. No console errors. Supportive tone preserved ('Support recommended — trajectory rising' — no punitive phrasing).
critical_code_review_comments: PlacementStabilityCard.jsx is 518 lines — borderline; consider splitting TrajectorySection/FactorList/ScoreSplitBar into their own modules to keep the card focused (<300 lines).

Trajectory-week-events testid is only emitted when key_events.length > 0; consider always rendering the wrapper (with empty state inside) so tests can reliably target it. Currently the latest week with 0 events shows 'No notable events recorded… placement quietly going well.' instead of the events ul — this is functionally correct and on-tone, just a minor testability nit.

openChronologyAt builds the date range with raw new Date math (-7d / +1d window). Boundary edge: if the week_ending_at is the placement's earliest week, the from_at could pre-date admission — backend already filters by resident, but worth confirming chronology view handles pre-admission dates gracefully.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing children resident Maddy O'Brien (id a1fb73b6-aced-4cf3-a053-0b861183f897)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 42b feature complete and fully working. Backend trajectory endpoint payload, RBAC, determinism, supportive tone, and PII safety all validated by /app/backend/tests/test_iteration42b.py (12 tests). Frontend e2e flow (login via /welcome -> Children's Services -> /login -> /children -> resident card -> profile -> placement-stability-card -> modal -> week-list interaction -> chronology deep link) all working without console errors. Trajectory label observed for Maddy: 'Support recommended — trajectory rising' (deteriorating label, but tone is supportive). Sparkline renders both on card (data-testid card-sparkline) and inside modal (modal-sparkline). 10 weekly buttons rendered. Chronology nav URL pattern confirmed: /residents/{id}?tab=timeline&from_at=...&to_at=... Note: trajectory-week-events ul only renders when active week has events; latest week showed empty-state copy instead — functionally correct, not a bug.
